pi_items.source: Verified in task.json, README, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh. Database query confirms patient named 'Robert' exists.
Verified in task.json, README, setup_task.sh (lines 10, 23), and export_result.sh (line 11). Database lookup confirms patient 'Robert MacPherson' exists.
Explicitly stated in task.json metadata field and confirmed in task description: 'Robert MacPherson (DOB: September 17, 1948)'

Date calculation: DOB 1948-09-17, current reference date 2026-03-07 (from CLAUDE.md). Since March 7 is after September 17, patient has already had birthday in 2025. Age = 2026 - 1948 = 78, minus 1 (hasn't had 2026 birthday yet) = 77 years old.
Consistently stated in task.json metadata, task description, README (lines 17, 34), and export_result.sh validation logic (lines 76-85 check for systolic 148-168, diastolic 82-102).

Verified in task.json metadata, task description, and export_result.sh (line 89 checks for 'Ramipril' or 'Altace' brand name). Web search confirms Ramipril is a real ACE inhibitor used for hypertension management.

Task description states 'Ramipril 10mg by mouth once daily'. Verified via web search that 10mg is a standard available dosage for Ramipril (available in 1.25, 2.5, 5, and 10mg strengths). Maximum dose is 10mg once daily.

Task requires agent to 'find it and mark it as complete/resolved' (task description, README line 21). Setup seeded OPEN tickler about 'Annual labs due' (setup_task.sh line 40). Export script checks if status changed from 'A' to 'C'/'I'/'D' (export_result.sh line 109).

Verified in task.json metadata (line 23), setup_oscar.sh (line 295 Firefox preference, line 325 desktop shortcut), and task_utils.sh (note: task_utils uses .do variant at line 26 for HTTP checks, but .jsp is the canonical login page).
Verified in task.json (line 25), setup_oscar.sh (lines 217, 372), and verified in database security table where password is configured for user 'oscardoc'.
Verified in task.json (line 26) and setup_oscar.sh (lines 207-221 configures SHA-1 password hash for 'oscar' and prints 'password: oscar' on line 217).
Verified in task.json (line 27), setup_oscar.sh (lines 217, 375 print 'PIN: 1117'), and task description text.

pi_items.verified_value: OSCAR is a real, open-source EMR system
pi_items.source: Web search confirmed: OSCAR = 'Open Source Clinical Application and Resource', initially developed by McMaster University in 2001, GPL v2+ licensed, widely deployed in Canada. Runs on Java/Tomcat with MySQL backend. Sources: https://oscargalaxy.org/, https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/OSCAR_McMaster

Web search confirmed: Ramipril is an ACE inhibitor used for hypertension and heart failure. Brand name: Altace. Indicated for patients >55 at cardiovascular risk. 85% of patients respond to 2.5-5mg/day. Sources: https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/NBK537119/, https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ramipril, https://www.mayoclinic.org/drugs-supplements/ramipril-oral-route/

pi_items.verified_value: Medically plausible. 77-year-old (age correction) with hypertension on annual review. BP 158/92 is Stage 2 hypertension. Ramipril 10mg OD is appropriate therapy.
pi_items.source: Medical literature and clinical guidelines support ACE inhibitor use for hypertension in elderly patients. BP 158/92 mmHg is clinically elevated (>130/80 defines hypertension). Task creates realistic clinical scenario.

pi_items.verified_value: Data is completely synthetic, seeded by setup scripts
pi_items.source: Analysis of setup_task.sh (lines 10-31): Patient fetched from database, measurements/drugs/ticklers cleared, then specific tickler seeded. Data originates from Docker containers (mariadb + open-osp image). No real patient data used.

privileged_info_summary: Robert MacPherson is a 77-year-old patient (DOB: 1948-09-17, though task description incorrectly states 76) with hypertension being seen for annual review. The task requires recording blood pressure 158/92 mmHg, prescribing Ramipril 10mg once daily, and resolving an open tickler reminder about overdue annual labs. All clinical details are medically appropriate: Ramipril is a real ACE inhibitor indicated for hypertension in elderly patients, and 10mg is a standard therapeutic dose. OSCAR EMR is a real, open-source electronic medical record system used in Canada. The patient data is entirely synthetic, seeded by the task setup scripts in a Docker-based OSCAR environment. Credentials (oscardoc/oscar/PIN 1117) are development/demo credentials configured in the Docker setup.
